items.title: worldmonitor
items.description: Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface
items.description_zh: 实时全球情报仪表板。在统一的态势感知界面中进行人工智能驱动的新闻聚合、地缘政治监控和基础设施跟踪

items.title: RuView
items.description: π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.
items.description_zh: π RuView 将商用 WiFi 信号转化为实时空间智能、生命体征监测和存在检测 - 所有这些都无需视频像素。

items.title: i-have-adhd
items.description: A skill for your coding agent to stop it from burying the answer. ADHD-friendly output.
items.description_zh: 您的编码代理可以阻止其隐藏答案的技能。多动症友好的输出。

items.title: croc
items.description: Easily and securely send things from one computer to another 🐊 📦
items.description_zh: 轻松安全地将内容从一台计算机发送到另一台计算机🐊📦

items.title: likec4
items.description: Visualize, collaborate, and evolve the software architecture with always actual and live diagrams from your code
items.description_zh: 使用代码中始终真实的实时图表来可视化、协作和发展软件架构

items.title: Apollo-11
items.description: Original Apollo 11 Guidance Computer (AGC) source code for the command and lunar modules.
items.description_zh: 用于命令和登月舱的原始阿波罗 11 号制导计算机 (AGC) 源代码。

items.title: voicebox
items.description: The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.
items.description_zh: 开源人工智能语音工作室。克隆、指令、创造。

items.title: OmniRoute
items.description: Never stop coding. Free MIT AI gateway: one endpoint, 268+ providers (50+ free), 500+ models — Kimi, Claude, GPT, OpenAI, Gemini, GLM, DeepSeek, MiniMax. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, Cline & Copilot. Quota-aware auto-fallback, RTK+Caveman compression saves 15-95% tokens, MCP/A2A, Desktop/PWA. Built by 500+ contributors
items.description_zh: 永远不要停止编码。免费 MIT AI 网关：一个端点、268 多个提供商（50 多个免费）、500 多个模型 — Kimi、Claude、GPT、OpenAI、Gemini、GLM、DeepSeek、MiniMax。适用于 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor、OpenCode、Cline 和 Copilot。配额感知自动回退、RTK+Caveman 压缩可节省 15-95% 的令牌、MCP/A2A、桌面/PWA。由 500 多名贡献者构建

items.title: Kronos
items.description: Kronos: A Foundation Model for the Language of Financial Markets
items.description_zh: Kronos：金融市场语言的基础模型

items.title: awesome-claude-skills
items.description: A curated list of awesome Claude Skills, resources, and tools for customizing Claude AI workflows
items.description_zh: 用于定制 Claude AI 工作流程的精彩 Claude 技能、资源和工具的精选列表

items.title: pi-web
items.description: Web UI for the pi coding agent
items.description_zh: pi 编码代理的 Web UI

items.title: ai-engineering-from-scratch
items.description: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.
items.description_zh: 学习它。建造它。寄给别人。

items.title: code-review-graph
items.description: Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows.
items.description_zh: MCP 和 CLI 的本地优先代码智能图。构建代码库的持久地图，以便 AI 编码工具仅读取重要内容，并在评论和大型存储库工作流程上进行基准上下文缩减。

items.title: cloudflare_temp_email
items.description: CloudFlare free temp domain email 免费收发 临时域名邮箱 支持附件 IMAP SMTP TelegramBot
items.description_zh: CloudFlare 免费临时域名电子邮件 免费收发 临时域名邮箱 支持附件 IMAP SMTP TelegramBot
